widely.example: English is widely spoken in many countries around the world.
widely.exampleCn: 英语在世界许多国家被广泛使用。

process.example: Learning is a slow process that requires patience and effort.
process.exampleCn: 学习是一个需要耐心和努力的缓慢过程。

France.example: France is famous for its art, history, and delicious bread.
France.exampleCn: 法国以其艺术、历史和美味的面包而闻名。

local.example: The local farmers sell fresh vegetables at the morning market.
local.exampleCn: 当地农民在早市上卖新鲜蔬菜。

Germany.example: Germany is known for making high-quality cars and machines.
Germany.exampleCn: 德国以制造高质量的汽车和机器而闻名。

material.example: We use recycled material to make eco-friendly bags.
material.exampleCn: 我们使用回收材料制作环保袋。

postman.example: The postman delivers letters to every house in our village.
postman.exampleCn: 邮递员给我们村里的每家每户送信。

international.example: The international festival brings artists from many countries.
international.exampleCn: 这个国际节日带来了来自许多国家的艺术家。

form.example: Storytelling is one of the oldest forms of human communication.
form.exampleCn: 讲故事是人类最古老的交流形式之一。

celebration.example: The whole town joined the celebration of the harvest festival.
celebration.exampleCn: 整个城镇都参加了丰收节的庆祝活动。

lively.example: The lively music made everyone want to dance.
lively.exampleCn: 这生气勃勃的音乐让每个人都想跳舞。

historical.example: The old bridge has great historical value for our city.
historical.exampleCn: 这座老桥对我们的城市有很大的历史价值。

heat.example: The summer heat in Yunnan is usually gentle and comfortable.
heat.exampleCn: 云南的夏日高温通常温和舒适。

polish.example: I need to polish my essay before handing it in tomorrow.
polish.exampleCn: 我需要在明天交之前润色我的文章。

complete.example: Teamwork helped us complete the project ahead of schedule.
complete.exampleCn: 团队合作帮助我们提前完成了项目。

l.be made of.example: This beautiful vase is made of fine china.
l.be made of.exampleCn: 这个美丽的花瓶是由精美瓷器制成的。

be made from.example: Paper is made from wood, so we should use it wisely.
be made from.exampleCn: 纸是由木头制成的，所以我们应该明智地使用它。

be known for.example: Yunnan is known for its beautiful flowers and fresh air.
be known for.exampleCn: 云南以其美丽的花朵和清新的空气而闻名。

no matter what.example: No matter what happens, I will always support my best friend.
no matter what.exampleCn: 无论发生什么，我都会永远支持我最好的朋友。

be made in.example: This toy was made in a factory that cares about safety.
be made in.exampleCn: 这个玩具是在一家注重安全的工厂制造的。

as far as I know.example: As far as I know, the library opens at eight every morning.
as far as I know.exampleCn: 据我所知，图书馆每天早上八点开门。

the science museum.example: We visited the science museum and saw many amazing inventions.
the science museum.exampleCn: 我们参观了科学博物馆，看到了许多惊人的发明。

the art and science fair.example: The art and science fair showed students' creative projects.
the art and science fair.exampleCn: 艺术科学展览会展示了学生们的创意项目。

environmental protection.example: Environmental protection starts with small actions in daily life.
environmental protection.exampleCn: 环境保护始于日常生活中的小行动。

a model plane.example: My brother built a model plane with his own hands.
a model plane.exampleCn: 我哥哥亲手制作了一个飞机模型。

a beautiful painting.example: A beautiful painting can express feelings that words cannot.
a beautiful painting.exampleCn: 一副漂亮的画作可以表达言语无法表达的情感。

in many different areas.example: English is used in many different areas, from science to art.
in many different areas.exampleCn: 英语在许多不同的领域被使用，从科学到艺术。

on the sides of the.example: Tea grows on the sides of the mountains in Yunnan.
on the sides of the.exampleCn: 茶树生长在云南的山坡上。

by hand.example: This traditional cloth was made by hand over many weeks.
by hand.exampleCn: 这块传统布料是用手工在数周内制作完成的。

be good for.example: Reading before bed is good for both mind and sleep.
be good for.exampleCn: 睡前阅读对大脑和睡眠都有好处。

be good at.example: She is good at painting landscapes of the Dianchi Lake.

make high-technology products.example: Our city plans to make high-technology products in the new factory.
make high-technology products.exampleCn: 我们的城市计划在新工厂制造高科技产品。

the earth's surface.example: Water covers most of the earth's surface.
the earth's surface.exampleCn: 水覆盖了地球表面的大部分。

many different kinds of.example: Yunnan has many different kinds of flowers that bloom all year.
many different kinds of.exampleCn: 云南有许多不同种类的花，全年盛开。

fly a kite.example: Children love to fly a kite when the spring wind blows.
fly a kite.exampleCn: 春风吹拂时，孩子们喜欢放风筝。

according to.example: According to the weather report, tomorrow will be sunny.
according to.exampleCn: 根据天气预报，明天会是晴天。

ask for help.example: Do not be afraid to ask for help when you face difficulties.
ask for help.exampleCn: 当你面临困难时，不要害怕请求帮助。

a symbol of.example: The red flag is a symbol of courage and unity.
a symbol of.exampleCn: 红旗是勇气和团结的象征。

good luck.example: My mother always wishes me good luck before every exam.
good luck.exampleCn: 我妈妈总是在每次考试前祝我好运。

at a very high heat.example: The potter shapes the clay at a very high heat.
at a very high heat.exampleCn: 陶工在高温下塑形黏土。

everyday things.example: Small everyday things, like a smile, can brighten someone's day.
everyday things.exampleCn: 像微笑这样的日常小事物可以照亮某人的一天。

shopping experiences.example: Online shopping has changed people's shopping experiences greatly.
shopping experiences.exampleCn: 网上购物极大地改变了人们的购物经历。

all parts of the world.example: People from all parts of the world visit Yunnan every year.
all parts of the world.exampleCn: 来自全世界各个地方的人们每年都来云南旅游。

traffic accidents.example: Following traffic rules can prevent most traffic accidents.
traffic accidents.exampleCn: 遵守交通规则可以预防大多数交通事故。

kite festival.example: The kite festival in Weifang attracts visitors from across China.
kite festival.exampleCn: 潍坊的风筝节吸引了来自全国各地的游客。

be from.example: My best friend is from a small village near Dali.
be from.exampleCn: 我最好的朋友来自大理附近的一个小村庄。

send out.example: The flowers send out a sweet smell that fills the garden.
send out.exampleCn: 这些花散发出一种甜美的香气，充满了花园。

be in trouble.example: When you are in trouble, true friends will stand by your side.
be in trouble.exampleCn: 当你处于困境中时，真正的朋友会站在你身边。

rise into.example: The hot air balloons rise into the blue sky at sunrise.
rise into.exampleCn: 热气球在日出时升上蓝天。

paper cutting.example: Paper cutting is a beautiful traditional art in China.
paper cutting.exampleCn: 剪纸是中国一种美丽的传统艺术。

be used by.example: This old building is used by artists as their studio.
be used by.exampleCn: 这座老建筑被艺术家们用作他们的工作室。

during the spring festival.example: Families gather for big dinners during the Spring Festival.
during the spring festival.exampleCn: 春节期间，家人们聚在一起吃年夜饭。

sky lanterns.example: People release sky lanterns to send wishes to the heavens.
sky lanterns.exampleCn: 人们放孔明灯把愿望送到天上。

all over the world.example: Chinese food is loved by people all over the world.
all over the world.exampleCn: 中国菜被全世界的人们喜爱。

glass.example: The artist used colored glass to create a stunning window.
glass.exampleCn: 艺术家用彩色玻璃创作了一扇令人惊叹的窗户。

heel.example: She wore shoes with a low heel for the long walk.
heel.exampleCn: 她穿了一双低跟鞋走长路。

zipper.example: The zipper on my bag broke, so I need to fix it.
zipper.exampleCn: 我包上的拉链坏了，我需要修理它。

pioneer.example: Deng Jiaxian was a pioneer in China's nuclear science.
pioneer.exampleCn: 邓稼先是中国核科学的先驱。

ruler.example: A good ruler cares more about people than power.
ruler.exampleCn: 一个好的统治者更关心人民而不是权力。

national.example: The national anthem fills every Chinese heart with pride.
national.exampleCn: 国歌让每一个中国人的心充满自豪。

trade.example: Fair trade helps farmers in poor areas earn a better living.
trade.exampleCn: 公平贸易帮助贫困地区的农民赚取更好的生活。

translate.example: I hope to translate Chinese poems into English one day.
translate.exampleCn: 我希望有一天能把中国诗歌翻译成英语。

sudden.example: The sudden rain surprised everyone at the outdoor concert.
sudden.exampleCn: 突如其来的大雨让户外音乐会的每个人都感到惊讶。

musical.example: My sister has a real musical talent for playing the piano.
musical.exampleCn: 我姐姐真有弹钢琴的音乐天赋。

sour.example: The sour taste of lemons makes me wake up quickly.
sour.exampleCn: 柠檬的酸味让我迅速清醒。

the Olympics.example: The Olympics bring athletes from every corner of the world together.
the Olympics.exampleCn: 奥运会把来自世界每个角落的运动员聚集在一起。

nearly.example: We have nearly finished reading this interesting novel.
nearly.exampleCn: 我们几乎读完了这本有趣的小说。

electricity.example: Electricity powers our homes, schools, and hospitals every day.
electricity.exampleCn: 电每天为我们的家、学校和医院供电。

style.example: Each nation has its own unique style of traditional clothing.
style.exampleCn: 每个国家都有自己独特的传统服装款式。

pleasure.example: It is my pleasure to help you learn English better.
pleasure.exampleCn: 帮助你更好地学习英语是我的荣幸。

daily.example: Daily exercise keeps both body and mind in good shape.
daily.exampleCn: 日常锻炼让身心都保持良好状态。

accidental.example: The accidental discovery changed the direction of his research.
accidental.exampleCn: 这个偶然的发现改变了他的研究方向。

boil.example: My grandmother always boils water before making tea.
boil.exampleCn: 我奶奶泡茶前总是先把水烧开。

remain.example: Even after many years, his kindness remains in my memory.
remain.exampleCn: 即使多年后，他的善良仍然留在我的记忆中。

smell.example: The smell of fresh bread from the bakery makes me hungry.
smell.exampleCn: 面包店新鲜面包的气味让我感到饥饿。

doubt.example: There is no doubt that honesty builds strong friendships.
doubt.exampleCn: 毫无疑问，诚实建立牢固的友谊。

lock.example: Please remember to lock the door when you leave the house.

salty.example: The soup was too salty, so I added some water.
salty.exampleCn: 汤太咸了，所以我加了一些水。

Canadian.example: Canadian winters are famous for being long and cold.
Canadian.exampleCn: 加拿大的冬天以漫长寒冷而闻名。

popularity.example: The popularity of online learning has grown rapidly.
popularity.exampleCn: 在线学习的受欢迎程度迅速增长。

hero.example: A true hero is someone who helps others without asking for reward.
hero.exampleCn: 真正的英雄是帮助他人而不求回报的人。

professional.example: She dreams of becoming a professional dancer on the big stage.
professional.exampleCn: 她梦想成为大舞台上的职业舞者。

be invented in.example: Paper was invented in China many centuries ago.
be invented in.exampleCn: 纸是许多世纪前在中国发明的。

be invented by sb.example: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.
be invented by sb.exampleCn: 电话是由亚历山大·格雷厄姆·贝尔发明的。

shoes with adjustable heels.example: Shoes with adjustable heels were designed for comfort.
shoes with adjustable heels.exampleCn: 可调后跟的鞋是为舒适而设计的。

change the style of sth.example: She decided to change the style of her room last summer.
change the style of sth.exampleCn: 她去年夏天决定改变她房间的风格。

see in the dark.example: Cats can see in the dark much better than humans.
see in the dark.exampleCn: 猫在黑暗中看路的能力比人类好得多。

run on electricity.example: Modern trains run on electricity instead of coal.
run on electricity.exampleCn: 现代火车用电而不是煤运行。

operate on sb.example: The doctor will operate on the patient tomorrow morning.
operate on sb.exampleCn: 医生明天早上要给病人动手术。

think of.example: Can you think of a better way to solve this problem?
think of.exampleCn: 你能想到一个更好的方法来解决这个问题吗？

with pleasure.example: With pleasure, I will help you carry these books.
with pleasure.exampleCn: 乐意效劳，我会帮你搬这些书。

think about.example: Take time to think about your future goals carefully.
think about.exampleCn: 花时间仔细考虑你未来的目标。

be used for.example: This tool is used for cutting paper into beautiful shapes.
be used for.exampleCn: 这个工具被用来把纸剪成美丽的形状。

be used by sb.example: The computer lab is used by students every afternoon.
be used by sb.exampleCn: 计算机实验室每天下午都被学生使用。

be used as.example: The old school building is now used as a community center.
be used as.exampleCn: 这座旧教学楼现在被用作社区中心。

be used to do sth.example: Bamboo can be used to do sth useful, like building houses.
be used to do sth.exampleCn: 竹子可以被用来做有用的事情，比如建造房屋。

by accident.example: I found my lost key by accident under the sofa.
by accident.exampleCn: 我偶然在沙发下找到了我丢失的钥匙。

make mistakes in sth.example: It is normal to make mistakes in sth new that you are learning.
make mistakes in sth.exampleCn: 在你学习的新事物上犯错是正常的。

mistake A for B.example: I mistook her twin sister for her at first glance.
mistake A for B.exampleCn: 我第一眼错把她的双胞胎妹妹当成了她。

in the end.example: In the end, hard work always brings sweet results.
in the end.exampleCn: 最后，努力工作总会带来甜美的成果。

at the end of.example: At the end of the road, you will find a beautiful lake.
at the end of.exampleCn: 在路的尽头，你会发现一个美丽的湖。

by the end of.example: By the end of this month, we will finish the project.
by the end of.exampleCn: 到本月底，我们将完成这个项目。

end up with.example: The party ended up with everyone singing together.
end up with.exampleCn: 聚会以大家一起唱歌结束。

end up doing sth.example: We ended up doing sth fun, like dancing in the rain.
end up doing sth.exampleCn: 我们最终做了一些有趣的事情，比如在雨中跳舞。

seem to do sth.example: He seems to do sth different from what he planned.
seem to do sth.exampleCn: 他似乎要做一些与他计划不同的事情。

seem like.example: This problem seems like something we have solved before.
seem like.exampleCn: 这个问题似乎像是我们以前解决过的。

seem that.example: It seems that tomorrow will be a perfect day for hiking.
seem that.exampleCn: 似乎明天是徒步的完美日子。

for a long time.example: I have wanted to visit Lijiang for a long time.
for a long time.exampleCn: 我想去丽江已经好长时间了。

sprinkle A on B.example: Grandma likes to sprinkle sugar on her homemade cakes.
sprinkle A on B.exampleCn: 奶奶喜欢把糖撒在她自制的蛋糕上。

at that time.example: At that time, we did not have smartphones or computers.
at that time.exampleCn: 在那时，我们没有智能手机或电脑。

It's said that.example: It's said that the old temple is over five hundred years old.
It's said that.exampleCn: 据说这座古庙已有五百多年的历史。

some time.example: I need some time to finish this difficult math problem.
some time.exampleCn: 我需要一些时间来完成这道难题。

boil drinking water.example: In the mountains, we always boil drinking water before use.
boil drinking water.exampleCn: 在山上，我们总是先把饮用水烧开再使用。

over an open fire.example: The farmers cook rice over an open fire during harvest season.
over an open fire.exampleCn: 农民们在收获季节在户外篝火上煮饭。

in the open air.example: I love reading in the open air under the shade of trees.
in the open air.exampleCn: 我喜欢在户外树荫下读书。

fall into.example: Be careful not to fall into the river while crossing the bridge.
fall into.exampleCn: 过桥时要小心不要落入河中。

make tea.example: My grandfather knows how to make tea in the traditional way.
make tea.exampleCn: 我爷爷知道如何用传统方式沏茶。

It's believed that.example: It's believed that hard work is the key to success.
It's believed that.exampleCn: 人们认为努力工作是成功的关键。

decide to do.example: I decided to do my best in every exam this semester.
decide to do.exampleCn: 我决定在本学期的每次考试中都尽我最大的努力。

in this.example: In this way, we can protect both culture and nature together.
in this.exampleCn: 这样，我们可以一起保护文化和自然。

take place.example: The school sports meeting will take place next Friday.
take place.exampleCn: 学校运动会将于下周五举行。

the popularity of.example: The popularity of reading has grown among young people.
the popularity of.exampleCn: 阅读在年轻人中的普及程度已经增长。
